to_buildworld.pivot_target: Open-source developer tools solving Big Tech technical gaps

build_now_1.description: Certify that your replacement LLM is behaviorally equivalent to the one it replaces — before you migrate. YAML test suite + 7-dimension behavioral scoring + parity certificate + CI gate.
build_now_1.biblical_pattern: PAT-041 — Revelation 5:1-9 (Seven Seals Worthiness — sequential behavioral authorization) + PAT-042 — Proverbs 11:1 (Differing Weights — consistent measurement)
build_now_1.key_differentiator: The first open-source tool framed as migration authorization rather than general evaluation. Parity certificate concept is novel. 7-dimensional scoring applied to cross-model comparison is novel. CI gate for migration blocking is novel.
build_now_1.status: IN-DESIGN — FULL SPEC COMPLETE — BUILD v0.1 NOW

build_now_2.description: Git-native prompt regression testing with judge calibration and trace-linked eval scoring for any LLM CI/CD pipeline
build_now_2.biblical_pattern: PAT-034 — Nehemiah 4:13-14 (guards at gaps in the wall)
build_now_2.key_differentiator: Judge calibration — validates that your LLM judge agrees with humans on your specific task before trusting it as a CI gate.

ship_now_1.description: Semantic LLM output specification compliance monitor. @spec decorator + SemanticConstraint DSL + DriftMonitor + CLI + GitHub Action.
ship_now_1.biblical_pattern: PAT-037 — Leviticus 10:1-3 (Authorized Fire — structural authorization ≠ semantic compliance)
ship_now_1.status: PROTOTYPE COMPLETE — SHIP TO PYPI NOW

ship_now_2.description: Git-native PR semantic intent verifier. Verifies that PR code changes fulfill the stated intent in the PR description.
ship_now_2.biblical_pattern: PAT-036 — Romans 7:7 (The law makes violations visible)
ship_now_2.key_differentiator: The only open-source tool that verifies whether a PR's code changes fulfill its stated intent — pre-merge, with a CI gate, for any git repo.
ship_now_2.status: PROTOTYPE COMPLETE — SHIP TO PYPI NOW

build_next_1.description: Behavioral contract enforcement for LLM function calls — @contract decorator + versioned behavioral specs + CI gate + drift detection
build_next_1.biblical_pattern: PAT-035 — Acts 2:1-13 (Pentecost — many languages, one coherent message contract)
build_next_1.status: DESIGN COMPLETE — BUILD AFTER prompt-lock v0.1

build_next_2.description: Semantic mutation testing for LLM prompts — systematically introduces semantic mutations (change the task slightly, add ambiguity, flip constraints) and verifies your test suite catches them
build_next_2.status: CANDIDATE — scored 8.90 tied with model-parity (tie-broken by larger market). Queue for cycle 015.
build_next_2.note: Excellent candidate. Mutahunter exists for code; nothing for LLM semantic prompt mutation. Narrower market than model-parity but strong differentiation.

notes: Six confirmed green-field tools in pipeline. model-parity DESIGNED — not just imagined. 400+ lines of specification. Revelation 5 is the most precise description of evidence-based authorization in all of literature. 'No one was found who was worthy to open the scroll.' The Lamb was worthy because of demonstrated evidence — not claimed capability. model-parity makes LLMs prove their worthiness before being authorized for production. Seven seals. Seven behavioral dimensions. The year of LLM migration begins. Certify. Then migrate.
